channel.title: Trendlyne Latest Market News
channel.description: Latest stock market insights and analyst calls from Trendlyne.

item.title: Market closes flat amid gains in metal and energy stocks as oil prices rise
item.description:
Nifty 50 closed at 23,412.60 (33.1, 0.1%), BSE Sensex closed at 74,608.98 (49.7, 0.1%) while the broader Nifty 500 closed at 22,377.35 (77.5, 0.4%). Market breadth is in the green. Of the 2,741 stocks...

Premium: No

item.title: Five stocks to buy from analysts this week - May 12, 2026
item.description:
1. Home First Finance Company India: Motilal Oswal reiterates its ‘Buy’ call on this housing finance company, with a target price of Rs 1,425, an upside of 28.6%. Analysts Abhijit Tibrewal and Nitin ...

item.title: IPO listing pace holds strong: Three more debuts this week after last week's trio
item.description:
The Nifty 50 closed lower on May 11, with the sell-off triggered by Prime Minister Narendra Modi's weekend address. The Prime Minister urged citizens to help conserve forex reserves by curbing non-ess...

item.title: Five Interesting Stocks Today - May 8, 2026
item.description:
1. Godrej Properties (GPL): This realty firm's shares rose 3.5% on May 4 after it reported its Q4FY26 results. Net profit surged 70.1% YoY, driven by strong inventory sales, while revenue rose 42%, su...

item.title: What drove multibaggers in FY26: Order books, commodity cycles and turnaround plays
item.description:
As the FY26 earnings season draws to a close, the fourth quarter has investors paying closer attention to management commentary. Rising crude oil prices, geopolitical tensions, and supply chain disrup...

item.title: Five stocks to buy from analysts this week - May 6, 2026
item.description:
1. Phoenix Mills: ICICI Direct retains its ‘Buy’ rating on this realty company, with a target price of Rs 2,200, an upside of 21.7%. The company delivered strong Q4FY26 results, boosting revenue by 2...

item.title: Primary market buzzes as Blackstone-backed REIT and Shark Tank brand Recode launch IPOs
item.description:
The Nifty 50 closed higher on May 4 after early state election trends supported broad-based buying. Realty, healthcare and FMCG stocks led the gains, with Godrej Properties rising after reporting a 70...

item.title: Five Interesting Stocks Today - April 30, 2026
item.description:

item.title: Confidence check: Which company promoters are buying, and which are selling stakes?
item.description:
Indian equities have been on a bumpy ride lately, reacting to Q4FY26 results and tensions in West Asia. IT stocks are tumbling as they remain exposed to a weak geopolitical environment and lag on the ...

item.title: Five stocks to buy from analysts this week - April 28, 2026
item.description:
1. ICICI Bank: Deven Choksey upgrades this bank to a ‘Buy’ call, with a target price of Rs 1,691 per share, an upside of 30.9%. This upgrade followed a strong Q4FY26. Provisions hit a 12-quarter low ...
